thinks.think: A static title card features a light brown, wood-grain background. Centered on the screen is the text "What Did You do this Weekend?" written in a green, serif font with a drop shadow effect. Two thin, horizontal white lines frame the text, one positioned above and one below the phrase. The image remains unchanged throughout the duration.

The video cuts from the title card to a snowy outdoor scene featuring a winding concrete track. Bare trees line the path, which curves through a forest covered in white snow. Small figures on sleds slide down the track, navigating the bends. The camera looks down the length of the run as the sleds descend.

A person on a sled continues sliding down the winding concrete track through the snowy forest. As the figure moves further down the path, the visual abruptly cuts to an extreme close-up of the track's brown wooden wall and the white snow surface.

A figure on a sled navigates a curve on the track near a lit lamp post amidst the snow. The video then transitions to a static title card featuring a light brown wood texture. Centered green text asks "Was it Warm?" framed by thin horizontal white lines above and below the phrase.

The scene transitions from the title card to a wide outdoor shot of a snowy landscape filled with bare trees. A group of people stands clustered together near the track in the middle distance. Overlay text reading "Muskegon Sports Center" appears at the bottom in a reddish-purple serif font with black outlines.

A static wide shot shows a snowy area with bare trees and a concrete track winding through the woods. A group of people stands in the center near the track base. The text "Muskegon Sports Center" in red font with black outlines stays at the bottom.

The static wide shot persists, displaying a snowy landscape with bare trees and a winding concrete track. A group of individuals in dark winter clothing remains clustered near the track's base. Snow-covered picnic tables sit in the foreground. The text "Muskegon Sports Center" stays overlaid at the bottom in a red serif font with black outlines.

The camera pans left, revealing additional bare trees on the left side of the snowy landscape. The group of people standing near the track base shifts toward the right edge of the frame. The winding concrete track curves upward in the background. The red text overlay "Muskegon Sports Center" remains fixed at the bottom center.

The text overlay vanishes, and the camera view changes to focus on an empty, curved concrete track section. Snow covers the ground and bare trees surround the winding path. The grey walls of the track curve from the left foreground into the background forest, devoid of any people or sleds.

A dark figure on a sled enters the frame, sliding rapidly down the curved concrete track. The person lies prone, navigating the bend surrounded by snow-covered ground and bare trees. The camera remains fixed on this section of the winding path as the sledder descends quickly.

The scene cuts to a brighter, daytime view looking down a straight track section where a line of people on sleds waits. In the foreground, a person wears a red hat and yellow jacket, seated on a sled. Behind them, others in dark clothing follow along the wooden track bordered by snow and bare trees.

The view shifts to the top of the track where people gather near wooden stairs. Individuals wearing red helmets and yellow jackets stand in line. One person in a black jacket sits on a sled on the ice surface, preparing to slide, while others wait nearby along the railing in the snowy woods.

A person wearing a yellow and blue jacket with a red helmet lies on a red sled sliding down the ice track. Next, an individual in a red jacket and tan pants slides down the track on their back on a red sled, legs extended forward.

A brown rectangular sign featuring white capital text reading "UPPER LUGE" is mounted on a vertical wooden post. Behind the sign, light-colored wooden siding forms a wall structure capped with a layer of white snow. The camera maintains a steady, close-up shot of this signage.

The video cuts to a straight, icy track flanked by wooden walls and two red markers. The view then changes to show an American flag on the left and a group of people gathered at the top of the ramp, near the start of the sloping concrete path surrounded by snow and bare trees.

The view stays on the upper track section where people gather near a wooden fence displaying an American flag. A sledder launches down the icy concrete chute, sliding rapidly away from the starting platform. The rider moves down the center of the track, flanked by snow-covered banks and bare trees in the background.

A sledder in dark attire slides down the middle of the white, icy track. They move away from the group at the top near the American flag, heading toward the camera. Wooden fences line the sides of the path, surrounded by snow and bare trees in the winter setting.

The scene cuts to a high-angle view of the winding concrete track curving through a snowy forest of bare trees. A dark figure on a sled navigates the curve further down the path, sliding along the icy surface amidst the winter landscape.

A high-angle view shows the winding concrete track curving through a snowy forest of bare trees. A dark figure on a sled navigates the distant curve, sliding along the icy surface. Wooden barriers line the track sides, and snow blankets the surrounding landscape.

The high-angle view shows the winding concrete track with a dark figure sledding down a distant curve among bare trees. The scene then cuts to a blurry, close-up perspective of a person in dark clothing sliding rapidly past a wooden wall, with the white track surface and snow visible in the background.

The view shifts to a wide shot of the concrete track curving through a snowy forest. A light pole with a glowing bulb stands near the bend. Wooden barriers line the path. Snow covers the ground and bare trees surround the area. A dark figure slides down the distant track.

The camera captures a snow-covered area bordered by a wooden retaining wall. Bare trees stand in the background behind the structure. A metal bench leg is visible in the bottom left corner. The concrete track is mostly out of frame, focusing on the snowy ground and forest edge.

Wooden stairs and posts in foreground. A person in a red jacket and black pants slides along the concrete track behind. Snow covers ground surrounding wooden structure. Sledder moves past beams, obscured by the stairs.

A close-up reveals a person in a red jacket and black pants sliding on the ice. The view then shows the individual, wearing a red helmet, sliding on their back around a curved section of the wooden track, surrounded by snow-covered banks.

A wide view captures a concrete track curving through a snowy forest of bare trees. A dark figure slides down the icy surface, moving away from the foreground towards a bend in the distance. Wooden walls line the path, and snow blankets the surrounding ground and tree bases.

A person in a red jacket and dark pants slides down a concrete track lined with wooden walls. The track curves through a snowy forest of bare trees. The individual lies on their back, moving from the distance toward the foreground along the icy path.

A person wearing a red jacket and dark pants slides rapidly down the concrete track on their back, moving from the middle distance toward the foreground. As the individual passes the camera position, the view shifts to an extreme, blurry close-up of the brown wooden retaining wall and the white icy surface of the track.

The view shifts to the track's end where a person in a red jacket and helmet sits on the snow. To the left, a standing figure in dark clothing is near trash cans. A large, beige, tarp-covered mound rests on the snow between them, while a blurry figure appears in the foreground right.

The scene transitions to a static title card with a light brown wood-grain background. Green serif text with drop shadows asks, "Who needs to go all the way to Vail?" The phrase is centered and framed by thin white horizontal lines above and below.

The title card vanishes, replaced by a wide outdoor shot of a snowy ridge under a grey sky. Bare trees line the distant horizon. A figure in dark clothing stands atop the snow-covered mound on the left side of the frame. The ground is covered in white snow with patches of brown earth visible on the slope.

A figure in dark attire walks along the crest of a large, snow-covered mound. Exposed brown earth patches the slope's side. A forest of bare trees lines the horizon under a grey, overcast sky. The individual traverses the ridge from left to right.

A figure in dark clothing traverses the top of a snowy ridge dotted with brown earth patches. Bare trees line the horizon beneath a grey sky. As the individual walks right, a second person appears sitting on the snow in the bottom right corner of the frame.

A person dressed in dark clothing skis down a snowy slope on the left, leaning forward in motion. To the right, another individual sits stationary on the snow. The hill is covered in white snow with exposed brown patches, backed by a line of bare trees under a grey, overcast sky.

A skier dressed in dark clothing descends a snowy slope from the left, leaning forward while navigating the terrain. To the right, another individual remains seated on the snow. The skier moves closer to the seated person across the white field dotted with brown patches and backed by trees.

A person in dark clothing skis down a snowy slope, moving from the left side toward the center. The background shows a snow-covered hill with patches of brown earth and bare trees under a grey sky. The seated individual seen previously is no longer visible in the frame.

A person in dark clothing skis further down the snowy slope, moving away from the camera. The background reveals a wider view of the horizon with bare trees and a body of water under an overcast sky. The skier remains the primary moving figure in the vast white landscape.

A figure in dark attire skis further down the snowy slope, distancing themselves from the camera and diminishing in size. The expansive white terrain includes scattered brown patches and a line of bare trees against a grey, overcast sky near the horizon.

A figure in dark attire continues skiing down the snowy slope, moving further away and appearing smaller in the distance. The camera captures a wide expanse of white snow dotted with brown patches and bare trees under a grey, overcast sky near the horizon.

A figure in dark clothing continues descending the snowy slope, moving further away and diminishing in size. The view encompasses a wide expanse of white snow dotted with brown patches and bare trees against a bright, overcast sky and a distant water horizon.

A figure in dark clothing continues moving down the snowy slope, diminishing in size as they travel further away. The wide shot encompasses the expansive white terrain dotted with brown earth and bare trees, set against a bright, overcast sky and a distant horizon line.

A figure in dark clothing continues descending the snowy slope, diminishing in size as they move further away. The camera captures the wide expanse of white snow dotted with brown patches and bare trees against a bright, overcast sky and distant horizon.

The video transitions from the distant snowy landscape to a static title card featuring a light brown wood-grain background. Centered between two thin white horizontal lines, large green serif text with dark drop shadows displays the phrase "We'll be Adults Soon Enough...".

The video presents a static title card with a light brown wood-grain background texture. The central text changes to display the phrase "Play Hard..." written in a large, green serif font with dark drop shadows. This text is positioned horizontally between two thin white lines that extend across the frame, marking a transition from the prior message.

The static title card updates its central text. The phrase "and earn Eagle!" is displayed in a large, green serif font with dark drop shadows. This text is positioned horizontally between two thin white lines on a light brown wood-grain background, replacing the previous message.

The static title card displaying the green serif phrase "and earn Eagle!" on a light brown wood-grain background darkens significantly. The lighting fades, turning the bright wooden texture into a dark shadow and making the green text appear much dimmer as the scene transitions toward blackness.

[20-24] The scene cuts to a brighter queue on a straight wooden track where a person in a red hat and yellow jacket waits in front of others; nearby at the top by stairs, individuals in red helmets and yellow jackets stand while one in a black jacket sits on a sled. [24-26] A person in a yellow/blue jacket and red helmet slides down, followed by an individual in a red jacket and tan pants on a red sled. [26-28] A brown sign reading "UPPER LUGE" is displayed on a wooden post against a snow-capped wall.

[28-30] The video opens on a straight icy track flanked by wooden walls and two red markers, then cuts to the top of a ramp where an American flag hangs on the left near a group of people gathered by a wooden fence. [30-34] A sledder in dark attire launches down the sloping concrete path, sliding rapidly away from the starting platform and down the center of the white, icy track toward the camera, flanked by snow-covered banks and bare trees in the winter setting. [34-38] The view shifts to a high-angle shot of the winding concrete track curving through a snowy forest of bare trees, where the dark figure navigates a distant curve along the icy surface lined with wooden barriers. [38-42] Following a blurry close-up of the person sliding past a wooden wall, the scene cuts to a wide shot of the track curving through the snow, featuring a light pole with a glowing bulb near the bend as the figure slides down the distant path surrounded by the forest.

[42-46] The scene opens on a snow-covered area bordered by a wooden retaining wall and bare trees. A metal bench leg is visible in the corner. The camera moves past wooden stairs and posts to reveal a person in a red jacket and black pants sliding along a concrete track behind the structure.
[46-54] Close-ups show the individual, wearing a red helmet, sliding on their back around a curved section of the wooden track. Wide shots capture the concrete path winding through the snowy forest as the person in the red jacket and dark pants slides rapidly from the distance toward the foreground, eventually passing the camera which captures a blurry close-up of the brown wall and ice.
[54-56] At the track's end, the sledder in the red jacket and helmet sits on the snow. To the left, a standing figure in dark clothing stands near trash cans, with a large beige tarp-covered mound resting on the snow between them.
[56-58] The video concludes with a static title card featuring a light brown wood-grain background. Green serif text with drop shadows asks, "Who needs to go all the way to Vail?" centered between thin white lines.

[58-64] A wide shot shows a snowy ridge under a grey sky with bare trees. A figure in dark clothing walks along the crest of a snow-covered mound on the left, traversing right over snow dotted with brown earth. [64-70] A second person sits on the snow to the right as the first figure, now skiing in dark attire, descends the slope leaning forward. The skier moves past the stationary individual, who then leaves the frame. [70-74] The skier continues down the slope away from the camera. The background reveals a wider horizon with bare trees and a body of water under an overcast sky as the skier diminishes in size across the expansive white terrain.

[74-82] A figure in dark attire continues skiing down the snowy slope, moving further away and diminishing in size. The view encompasses a wide expanse of white snow dotted with brown patches and bare trees against a bright, overcast sky and a distant water horizon. [82-84] The video transitions to a static title card featuring a light brown wood-grain background. Centered between two thin white horizontal lines, large green serif text with dark drop shadows displays the phrase "We'll be Adults Soon Enough...". [84-86] The central text changes to "Play Hard..." written in a large, green serif font with dark drop shadows, positioned horizontally between the white lines. [86-88] The text updates to "and earn Eagle!", displayed in the same large, green serif font with dark drop shadows on the light brown wood-grain background.

Small figures on sleds slide down the concrete path, navigating curves near a lit lamp post, followed by an extreme close-up of the track's wooden wall. [8-10] A second title card appears with the text "Was it Warm?" in green on the same wood texture. [10-14] The video ends on a static wide shot of the "Muskegon Sports Center," identified by reddish-purple text at the bottom. A group of people in dark clothing stands clustered near the track base, surrounded by snow-covered picnic tables and forest.

[14-18] The camera pans left past bare trees and a group near the track base with "Muskegon Sports Center" text overlay, which vanishes to reveal an empty curved concrete track surrounded by snow. [18-20] A dark figure slides rapidly down the curve on a sled. [20-24] The scene cuts to a brighter queue on a straight wooden track where a person in a red hat and yellow jacket waits in front of others; nearby at the top by stairs, individuals in red helmets and yellow jackets stand while one in a black jacket sits on a sled. [24-26] A person in a yellow/blue jacket and red helmet slides down, followed by an individual in a red jacket and tan pants on a red sled. [26-28] A brown sign reading "UPPER LUGE" is displayed on a wooden post against a snow-capped wall.

[28-30] The video opens on a straight icy track flanked by wooden walls and two red markers, then cuts to the top of a ramp where an American flag hangs on the left near a group of people gathered by a wooden fence. [30-34] A sledder in dark attire launches down the sloping concrete path, sliding rapidly away from the starting platform and down the center of the white, icy track toward the camera, flanked by snow-covered banks and bare trees in the winter setting. [34-38] The view shifts to a high-angle shot of the winding concrete track curving through a snowy forest of bare trees, where the dark figure navigates a distant curve along the icy surface lined with wooden barriers. [38-42] Following a blurry close-up of the person sliding past a wooden wall, the scene cuts to a wide shot of the track curving through the snow, featuring a light pole with a glowing bulb near the bend as the figure slides down the distant path surrounded by the forest.

[42-46] The scene opens on a snow-covered area bordered by a wooden retaining wall and bare trees. A metal bench leg is visible in the corner. The camera moves past wooden stairs and posts to reveal a person in a red jacket and black pants sliding along a concrete track behind the structure.
[46-54] Close-ups show the individual, wearing a red helmet, sliding on their back around a curved section of the wooden track. Wide shots capture the concrete path winding through the snowy forest as the person in the red jacket and dark pants slides rapidly from the distance toward the foreground, eventually passing the camera which captures a blurry close-up of the brown wall and ice.
[54-56] At the track's end, the sledder in the red jacket and helmet sits on the snow. To the left, a standing figure in dark clothing stands near trash cans, with a large beige tarp-covered mound resting on the snow between them.
[56-58] The video concludes with a static title card featuring a light brown wood-grain background. Green serif text with drop shadows asks, "Who needs to go all the way to Vail?" centered between thin white lines.

[58-64] A wide shot shows a snowy ridge under a grey sky with bare trees. A figure in dark clothing walks along the crest of a snow-covered mound on the left, traversing right over snow dotted with brown earth. [64-70] A second person sits on the snow to the right as the first figure, now skiing in dark attire, descends the slope leaning forward. The skier moves past the stationary individual, who then leaves the frame. [70-74] The skier continues down the slope away from the camera. The background reveals a wider horizon with bare trees and a body of water under an overcast sky as the skier diminishes in size across the expansive white terrain.
